title: Log in with valid credentials
description: This test verifies that a user can submit valid credentials on the login page and reach the authenticated app.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated area is displayed

title: Log in to a workspace and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies that a workspace member can sign in with valid credentials and arrive at the authenticated dashboard for that workspace.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the workspace dashboard is displayed
Verify the user is in the correct workspace context

title: Create a new workspace successfully
description: This test verifies that a new user can complete registration and create a workspace with a team slug.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the company name field with a new workspace name
Fill in the workspace slug field with a unique slug
Verify the workspace creation success state is visible
Verify the authenticated workspace area is displayed

title: Upload an image asset to the library
description: This verifies that a workspace user can upload an image and see it appear in the asset library.

steps.description: Fill in the upload control with a valid image file
Verify the uploaded asset appears in the library
Verify the asset list is populated

title: Upload a video asset to the library
description: This verifies that a workspace user can upload a video and see it appear in the asset library.

steps.description: Fill in the upload control with a valid video file
Verify the uploaded asset appears in the library
Verify the asset list is populated

title: Create and save a new playlist with media items
description: This test verifies that a workspace user can create a playlist, add media items, and save a usable playlist configuration.

steps.description: Fill in the workspace login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add media items to the playlist timeline
Verify the new playlist is displayed in the playlists area
Verify the playlist contains added items

title: View signage content on the player page
description: This verifies that the public player page renders full-screen digital signage content for a connected display.

steps.description: Verify full-screen digital content is displayed
Verify the player view is visible

title: Pair a new screen with a numeric code
description: This test verifies that an operator can pair a screen by entering a valid numeric code and see it appear in the workspace list.

steps.description: Fill in the workspace login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter a valid numeric pairing code
Verify the new screen appears in the screen list
Verify the screen shows a paired status

title: See live content updates on the player page
description: This verifies that the player view reacts to live content changes and updates the displayed signage content accordingly.

steps.description: Verify full-screen digital content is displayed
Verify updated content appears in the player view

title: Reorder playlist items before saving
description: This test verifies that a workspace user can change playlist item order and save the updated sequence.

steps.description: Fill in the workspace login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add media items to the playlist timeline
Verify the saved playlist is displayed
Verify the item order is reflected in the playlist

title: Assign a playlist to a paired screen
description: This test verifies that an operator can assign a playlist to an existing screen and see the assignment reflected in the screen list.

steps.description: Fill in the workspace login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Assign a playlist to the screen
Verify the screen shows the selected playlist
Verify the screen remains in the workspace list

title: Delete an asset from the library
description: This verifies that a workspace user can remove an existing asset and see it disappear from the library.

steps.description: Verify the asset is removed from the library
Verify the asset list no longer includes the deleted item

title: Keep playlist changes after saving and returning to the list
description: This test verifies that a saved playlist remains available after the user leaves and returns to the playlists area.

steps.description: Fill in the workspace login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add media items to the playlist timeline
Verify the saved playlist remains available
Verify the playlist can be opened again

title: Show validation feedback for invalid workspace login
description: This verifies that submitting incorrect workspace credentials shows validation errors and does not grant access.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with an invalid email value
Fill in the password field with an invalid password value
Verify validation error messages are visible
Verify the workspace dashboard is not displayed

title: Add a widget to the workspace asset library
description: This verifies that a workspace user can add a supported widget and see it listed among workspace assets.

steps.description: Verify the widget appears in the asset library
Verify the workspace assets include the new widget

title: Rename a screen and keep its pairing
description: This test verifies that an operator can rename a paired screen and the updated name remains visible in the device list.

steps.description: Fill in the workspace login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated screen name is visible

title: Show validation feedback for incomplete workspace registration
description: This test verifies that submitting the sign up form without required information shows validation feedback and prevents workspace creation.

steps.description: Verify registration validation errors are visible

title: See validation feedback for invalid login details
description: This test verifies that submitting invalid credentials on the login page shows validation errors and does not continue into the authenticated area.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with incorrect-password
Verify login validation errors are visible

title: Reach sign up from the landing page
description: This test verifies that a public visitor can start from the homepage and navigate to the registration page.

steps.description: Click the link to sign up
Verify the registration page is displayed

title: Reach workspace creation from the landing page
description: This test verifies that a public visitor can start from the homepage and reach the workspace registration flow.

steps.description: Click the link to create a workspace
Verify the registration page is displayed

title: Reach login from the landing page
description: This test verifies that a public visitor can start from the homepage and navigate to the login screen.

steps.description: Click the link to log in
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Show a validation error when saving an empty playlist
description: This test verifies that the playlist builder prevents saving when no media items have been added.

steps.description: Fill in the workspace login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the playlist is not saved

title: Block unsupported media from being added to the library
description: This verifies that unsupported media cannot be added and that the asset library shows validation feedback instead of creating the item.

steps.description: Fill in the upload control with an unsupported media file
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the unsupported file is not added to the library

title: Reject an invalid pairing code
description: This test verifies that the pairing flow shows an error when the operator enters an invalid numeric code and does not add a new screen.

steps.description: Fill in the workspace login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a pairing validation error is visible
Verify no new screen is added

title: Handle an empty screen list
description: This test verifies that the screens page shows an empty state when no devices are paired yet.

steps.description: Fill in the workspace login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify an empty state message is visible
